data.title: record-test-status.sh: stale RED marker causes false failed status when test goes GREEN
data.description: When a test in .test-index has a RED marker (e.g., source.sh:[test_name]) and the test starts passing, record-test-status.sh writes status=failed with empty failed_tests. Pre-commit test gate then blocks commits with no named failing test. Workaround: remove the marker and re-run with --restart.
